name: web-research-mcp
description: Web research MCP server — data tampering via poisoned search results and API key exposure through env leakage (arXiv:2507.06250)
version_note: Version 0.1.0 is the initial PyPI release available closest to the paper submission date (July 2025).
benchmark_note: Exact version used in arXiv:2507.06250 is not disclosed; 0.1.0 is the best estimate given the paper date and package publication timeline.
